description: Create a SUMO highway on-ramp merge scenario in `~/SUMO_Output/highway_merge/` and generate simulation results. The scenario must include the following files: `highway_merge.nod.xml` (≥ 4 nodes: highway entry, merge junction, highway exit, ramp entry), `highway_merge.edg.xml` (highway-before-merge: 3 lanes, 33.33 m/s; on-ramp: 1 lane, 22.22 m/s; highway-after-merge: 3 lanes, 33.33 m/s), `highway_merge.net.xml`, `highway_merge.rou.xml` (mainline flow: 1200 veh/hr; ramp flow: 400 veh/hr), `highway_merge.det.xml` (E1 induction loop on downstream edge, freq="300", file="detector_output.xml"), and `highway_merge.sumocfg` (configured for 0 to 1800 seconds). The task is complete when `tripinfo.xml` and `detector_output.xml` are generated in the output directory.
